title: helichrysum × valentinum
intro: Helichrysum × valentinum, also known as Valentine's Gold or Val's Gold, is a sterile hybrid plant derived from the cross between Helichrysum italicum and Helichrysum stoechas. This plant is valued for its essential oils, which possess antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antioxidant properties, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. The medicinal properties of Helichrysum × valentinum have been associated with various health benefits, including reducing inflammation, improving wound healing, and alleviating symptoms of anxiety and depression. Helichrysum × valentinum is often used in herbal preparations such as essential oils, tinctures, and salves, which can be applied topically to take advantage of its medicinal properties.
